# Patch Notes

May 21, 2026

### Overwatch Retail Patch Notes - May 21, 2026

#### Hero Balance Changes

This hotfix includes small adjustments. This developer-commentary paragraph should not become a label.

Image: D.Va

##### D.Va

Fusion Cannons
Primary Fire

  * Damage reduced from 2.0 to 1.8.

Image: Kiriko

##### Kiriko

Protection Suzu

  * Cooldown reduced from 15 to 14 seconds.

#### Bug Fixes

General

  * Fixed an issue affecting match UI.

Heroes
Junker Queen

  * Fixed an issue with post-match stats.

Top of post

May 12, 2026

### Overwatch Retail Patch Notes – May 12, 2026

#### TANKS

##### Roadhog

Chain Hook

  * Cooldown reduced from 7 to 6 seconds.

##### Kiriko

Kitsune Rush
